positive: A symmetrical, highly stylized botanical mandala pattern featuring interwoven Monstera leaves, palm fronds, and delicate abstract vines. The design should utilize a flat, linocut-style graphic aesthetic with crisp, clean silhouettes. Composition must be centered and perfectly symmetrical, suitable for a repeating seamless textile print. Color palette limited to deep teal, burnt ochre orange, and cream off-white. High contrast, bold line work, minimalist tropical geometry, vector illustration, screen print graphic design, centered composition, maximal detail in the flora structure, retro maximalist style.
negative: low detail, blurry, noise, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, text, signature, watermark, logo, gradient, photographic, realistic, 3d render, faded, stained
